description: Datacendia Legal Vertical Workflows - 25 Legal Practice Workflows using 50+ Legal Council Modes

workflows.name: M&A Due Diligence - Full Deal Room

steps.action: Ingest target company documents via Data Diode
Run contract analysis on all material agreements
Analyze closing conditions and regulatory approvals
Deal Room Council deliberation on transaction

workflows.councilQuestion: We are acquiring TargetCo for $50M. Due diligence has identified 3 material contracts with change-of-control provisions, potential IP ownership issues in 2 patents, and an ongoing employment dispute. Should we proceed, renegotiate price, or walk away?

workflows.name: Complex Litigation Strategy - War Room

steps.action: Analyze case facts and legal theories
Research controlling precedent and distinguish adverse cases
Model opponent strategy with Opposing Counsel agent

workflows.councilQuestion: Plaintiff has filed a $10M breach of contract claim. Our analysis shows 65% win probability at trial, but $500K defense costs through verdict. Plaintiff offered $2M settlement. Best case: defense verdict. Worst case: $10M + fees. Should we fight, settle, or make counter-offer?

workflows.name: SEC Investigation Response

steps.action: Implement litigation hold on all relevant documents
Privilege review of all potentially responsive documents
Analyze cooperation vs. rights protection balance
Prepare response strategy with regulatory specialist

workflows.councilQuestion: SEC has issued a subpoena for documents related to our Q3 revenue recognition. Internal review found one questionable transaction. Should we proactively disclose, respond narrowly to subpoena, or assert privilege on internal analysis?

workflows.name: Patent Portfolio Strategy

steps.action: Conduct freedom-to-operate analysis for new product

workflows.councilQuestion: Our new product may infringe 2 competitor patents. Options: design around ($500K, 6 months), license ($2M upfront + 3% royalty), or proceed and risk litigation ($5M exposure). FTO analysis shows 40% infringement risk. What's the optimal IP strategy?
workflows.expectedOutcome: Approved IP strategy with risk mitigation

workflows.name: Contract Negotiation - Major Vendor

steps.action: Analyze vendor's proposed terms against playbook
Risk-rate each clause and identify deal-breakers

workflows.councilQuestion: Vendor insists on unlimited liability for us but caps their liability at contract value. They also want exclusive jurisdiction in their state. Our playbook says mutual caps and our jurisdiction. What's our fallback position and walk-away point?

workflows.name: eDiscovery Document Review

steps.action: Ingest document collection via Data Diode
AI-assisted privilege review with Privilege Officer

workflows.councilQuestion: We have 50,000 documents to review for production. AI review identified 5,000 potentially privileged, 2,000 responsive, and 100 hot documents. Opposing counsel is pushing for quick production. Should we do full attorney review of all 5,000 privileged docs or use AI-assisted sampling?

workflows.name: Employment Termination Review
workflows.councilQuestion: Manager wants to terminate employee for performance issues. Employee is 58 years old, recently complained about workload, and is the only person over 50 in the department. Documentation is thin. Should we proceed with termination, implement PIP first, or reassign?
workflows.expectedOutcome: Approved termination strategy with risk mitigation

workflows.name: Criminal Defense Strategy

steps.action: Develop jury strategy and voir dire plan

workflows.councilQuestion: Client is charged with wire fraud. Government has cooperating witness and some documentary evidence. We identified potential Fourth Amendment issue with email seizure. Plea offer is 18 months. Trial risk is 5-10 years. Should we file suppression motion, negotiate plea, or prepare for trial?

workflows.name: AI Product Compliance Review

steps.action: Classify AI system under EU AI Act risk tiers
Audit training data for IP and privacy issues
Develop compliance roadmap and governance framework

workflows.councilQuestion: Our new AI hiring tool may be classified as high-risk under EU AI Act. We need to deploy in 3 months. Full compliance would take 6 months. Should we delay launch, deploy in non-EU markets first, or accept enforcement risk in EU?

workflows.name: Data Breach Response

steps.action: Assess scope of breach and affected data
Prepare notification letters and regulatory filings
Analyze litigation exposure and insurance coverage

workflows.councilQuestion: Breach affected 100,000 customers across 15 states and EU. We have 72 hours for GDPR notification. State laws vary from 30-90 days. Should we do single global notification now, or staggered by jurisdiction to manage messaging?

workflows.name: Antitrust Merger Review

steps.action: Define relevant markets and calculate HHI
Analyze competitive effects and entry barriers
Assess HSR filing requirements and timing

workflows.councilQuestion: Proposed acquisition would give us 35% market share in key segment. HHI increase is 400 points. DOJ has been aggressive in this sector. Should we proceed with HSR filing, offer upfront divestitures, or restructure deal to avoid thresholds?

workflows.name: Class Action Defense
workflows.councilQuestion: Plaintiffs seek to certify class of 500,000 customers claiming $50 each in overcharges. Total exposure: $25M + fees. We have strong commonality defense but weak on damages. Settlement demand is $5M. Should we fight certification, settle pre-certification, or prepare for class trial?

workflows.name: Crypto Token Launch Review

steps.action: Conduct Howey test analysis on token

workflows.councilQuestion: Our utility token has some investment characteristics. Howey analysis shows 60% chance SEC views as security. Options: register as security ($2M, 12 months), launch as utility with risk, or restructure token economics. What's the optimal path?

workflows.name: White Collar Investigation Response

steps.action: Implement document preservation and litigation hold
Conduct internal investigation with privilege protection
Analyze cooperation vs. individual rights balance
Prepare for employee interviews and Upjohn warnings

workflows.councilQuestion: DOJ has issued grand jury subpoena for documents related to potential FCPA violations. Internal review found questionable payments by foreign subsidiary. Should we self-disclose, respond narrowly to subpoena, or conduct full internal investigation first?

workflows.name: International Trade Compliance

steps.action: Screen transaction parties against OFAC lists

workflows.councilQuestion: Customer in UAE wants to purchase our software which has encryption. End-user is a government entity. EAR classification is 5D002. Should we apply for license, use license exception, or decline the sale?

workflows.name: Real Estate Transaction

steps.action: Review title report and identify exceptions
Conduct environmental and zoning due diligence
Negotiate purchase agreement and closing conditions

workflows.councilQuestion: Title search revealed easement that may affect planned expansion. Environmental Phase I found potential contamination requiring Phase II. Seller wants to close in 30 days. Should we proceed with contingencies, renegotiate price, or walk away?

workflows.name: Bankruptcy Filing Analysis

steps.action: Analyze preference and fraudulent transfer exposure

workflows.councilQuestion: Company has $10M in debt, $3M in assets, and negative cash flow. Secured creditor is threatening foreclosure. Options: Chapter 7 liquidation, Chapter 11 reorganization, or out-of-court workout. Which path maximizes stakeholder value?

workflows.name: Healthcare Regulatory Compliance

steps.action: Audit HIPAA compliance and BAA coverage
Analyze Stark Law and Anti-Kickback implications
Review FDA regulatory pathway for new device

workflows.councilQuestion: New physician referral arrangement may trigger Stark Law concerns. Fair market value analysis is borderline. Options: restructure arrangement, obtain advisory opinion, or proceed with enhanced documentation. What's the safest path?

workflows.name: Product Liability Defense

steps.action: Assess recall decision and liability exposure
Model mass tort and MDL scenarios

workflows.councilQuestion: 10 injury claims filed alleging product defect. Engineering says design is sound but warnings could be clearer. Recall would cost $5M. Litigation exposure is $20M. Should we issue voluntary recall, enhance warnings only, or defend all claims?

workflows.name: Appellate Strategy

steps.action: Analyze trial record for preserved issues
Research standards of review for each issue
Develop brief strategy and oral argument prep

workflows.councilQuestion: We lost at trial on summary judgment. Three potential issues for appeal: evidentiary ruling (abuse of discretion), jury instruction (de novo), and damages calculation (clearly erroneous). Which issues should we prioritize and what's our win probability?

workflows.name: Government Contract Bid Protest

steps.action: Assess GAO vs. COFC protest venue

workflows.councilQuestion: We lost $50M contract award. Debrief revealed agency may have improperly evaluated our technical proposal. GAO protest deadline is 10 days. Protest costs $100K. Win rate is 20%. Should we protest at GAO, COFC, or accept the loss?

workflows.name: Entertainment Deal Negotiation

steps.action: Analyze talent agreement terms and backend
Review IP rights and distribution terms
Calculate backend participation and audit rights

workflows.councilQuestion: Studio offers $500K upfront + 5% of net profits for our IP. Industry standard is 10% of adjusted gross. Net profits definition is unfavorable. Should we counter on backend definition, push for gross participation, or take the guaranteed money?

workflows.name: Fintech Licensing Strategy

steps.action: Evaluate bank partnership vs. direct licensing

workflows.councilQuestion: Our payment product requires MTL in 48 states. Direct licensing takes 18 months and $2M. Bank partnership is 6 months and $500K but limits product flexibility. Should we pursue direct licensing, bank partnership, or hybrid approach?

workflows.name: Labor Union Negotiation

steps.action: Analyze current CBA and union demands
Assess NLRA compliance and ULP risks
Model economic impact of union proposals
Develop bargaining strategy and fallback positions

workflows.councilQuestion: Union demands 15% wage increase over 3 years. Our offer is 8%. Strike authorization vote is next week. A strike would cost $1M/day. Should we increase offer, hold firm, or propose alternative benefits package?

workflows.name: Legal Intern Training Session

steps.action: Present case study with learning objectives
Explain practical application and next steps

workflows.councilQuestion: Intern has drafted memo on contract interpretation issue. Analysis is partially correct but misses key precedent and uses wrong standard. How should we provide feedback that teaches legal reasoning while building confidence?
workflows.expectedOutcome: Completed training session with learning outcomes
